name: Veritas Governance Kit
description: Installable governance workflows and agent guidance backed by the standalone @kontourai/veritas readiness engine.

flows.description: Gate a repository change on the canonical Veritas software-readiness verdict.
Review and approve a Veritas Repo Standards authoring plan before applying it.

skills.description: Install or detect the Veritas CLI, author Repo Standards, configure hooks, attest the baseline, and run initial readiness.
Pull just-in-time repo governance guidance from the Veritas engine before editing.
Derive and human-review Repo Standards through the standards-authoring flow.

docs.description: Git installation, activation, engine setup, and readiness-gate guide.
